title: Minority Narrative Engine Story
description: Schema for .story.json files used by the Minority Narrative Engine toolkit.

title.description: Human-readable story title displayed in the editor and UI.

description.description: Short story synopsis shown in the story browser.

version.description: Story version string. Increment when you add/remove nodes for save-game compatibility.

culturalContext.description: Primary cultural context key matching a CulturalContextBase asset (e.g. 'black_american', 'indigenous', 'southeast_asian', 'latinx').

startNodeId.description: ID of the first node to display when the story begins.

nodes.description: All nodes in the story. Order does not matter — nodes are looked up by id.

id.description: Unique identifier for this node. Used by choices and nextNodeId to reference this beat.

type.description: Node type. 'end' marks a story ending and triggers OnStoryComplete.

speakerId.description: Character ID of the speaker. Must match a CharacterProfile.characterId. Leave empty for narration.

text.description: Dialogue or narration text. Supports tokens: {honorific.TOKEN}, {name}. Code-switching is applied automatically based on cultural context.

displayDuration.description: Seconds to display before auto-advancing. -1 means wait for player input.

culturalTags.description: Oral tradition pattern roles and other cultural tags. E.g. 'call_and_response', 'elder_wisdom', 'dicho'.

collectiveFrame.description: Hints to the UI how to frame this beat on the individual/collective spectrum.

choices.description: Choices available to the player from this node. If empty, the node advances linearly via nextNodeId.

nextNodeId.description: ID of the next node for linear (no-choice) flow. Ignored if choices is non-empty.

text.description: Button text shown to the player.

targetNodeId.description: Node to navigate to when selected.

communityImpact.description: One-line description of how this choice affects the community.

individualImpact.description: One-line description of how this choice affects the protagonist.

collectivityDelta.description: How much this choice moves the collectivity score. +1 = fully collective, -1 = fully individual.
